creator: laurent@daverio.net
text:
(In reply to Laurent Daverio from comment #16)

For the people who are here because they are trying to install Rails or Gitlab, I've used the following workaround :

1- In /usr/local/www/gitlab-ce, type (as root) "gem install selenium-webdriver"

2- Edit Makefile in /usr/ports/www/rubygem-rails5 to remover the dependency to rubygem-selenium-webdriver

3- From there, Rails and Gitlal can be installed normally.

Hope this helps :) I've been a few days without Gitlab, and this was becoming problematic to me.

Laurent.
